scripts.test:e2e:example: TEST_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 ROWND_E2E=1 ROWND_E2E_CONFIG_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100/config xcodebuild -workspace rownd.xcworkspace -scheme rownd_ios_example -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' -only-testing:rownd_ios_exampleTests/RowndExampleTests/testExampleAppCanUseHarnessBackedSuperTokensSession test
scripts.test:e2e: E2E_HUB_PORT=8788 IOS_HUB_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788 npm run test:integration:harness & HARNESS_PID=$!; cleanup() { kill $HARNESS_PID 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3100/health >/dev/null && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:8788/health >/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; npm run test:e2e:example
scripts.test:package: npm run test:package:auth && npm run test:package:rownd && npm run test:package:shared
scripts.test:all: npm run test:package && npm run test:example
